stem: In an investment-linked policy (ILP), the investment risk is borne by:
explanation: ILP 价值随基金浮动,风险由保单持有人承担。
sourceRef: MAS Notice 307 (ILP disclosure/fund/fee); suitability per FAA advisory process (FAA-N16 / reasonable basis)

stem: Which statement about ILPs is correct?

options.B: Their value fluctuates with the performance of the chosen sub-funds and fees apply

explanation: ILP 无资本保证,价值随基金浮动且收取费用。
sourceRef: MAS Notice 307 (ILP disclosure/fund/fee); suitability per FAA advisory process (FAA-N16 / reasonable basis)
